notes.claude_2.1.153: REQUIRES PROXY - DeepSeek /anthropic endpoint returns malformed thinking blocks. Launcher now auto-starts claude-deepseek-proxy.js to sanitize SSE stream. Simple prompts work; some tool-using prompts may still fail due to DeepSeek API edge cases.
